title: Feuilleea spruceana
taxonomy: Feuilleea spruceana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is also known as a climbing or woody vine. The plant is further classified as being in the order Celastrales and the class Magnoliopsida. Further taxonomic classification places Feuilleea spruceana in the kingdom Plantae.
